Name: Stage Keys
Author: Beennnn
Description: Full-colour sound-select icons for the live keyboardist — one Stream Deck key per voice. Complete General MIDI / XP set (128 programs, 16 families) PLUS modern synth categories (synthesizer, drum kit, drum machine, sampler/MPC, arpeggio, mellotron, vocoder). Recognise the sound at a glance under stage lighting, no menu-diving.
